ticket: Thanks for opening a ticket. We’re on it and will follow up soon.
To help us resolve this fast, share any details you can (time, place, who).
Please stay in this channel while we review.
triage: Thanks for reaching out. We’re going to take a look and make sure you’re safe.
Please summarize what happened and who was involved.
If you have screenshots or clips, drop them here so we can review.
conflict: I hear you. We’re reviewing the situation and will follow up shortly.
Please avoid retaliation while we investigate. We’ll handle it.
If you have evidence or context, post it here so we can act quickly.
bug: Thanks for the report. Can you share steps to reproduce the issue?
If possible, include your location, time, and any screenshots.
We’ll log this and update you once it’s reviewed.
appeal: We can review an appeal. Please share the situation and any evidence.
We’ll provide a decision after staff review. Thanks for your patience.
harassment: We take harassment seriously. Please share what happened and when.
If you feel unsafe, let us know immediately so we can prioritize.
cheating: Thanks for reporting. Please provide details, timestamps, and any evidence.
We’ll investigate quietly and take action if confirmed.
outage: We’re aware of service issues and are investigating.
We’ll post an update once we have confirmed details.

announcement: Official notice: we’re aware of the issue and investigating.
We’ll share updates here as soon as we have confirmed details.
Thank you for your patience while staff resolves this.
escalation: Escalated to ownership for review. We’ll respond after investigation.
We’re prioritizing safety and clarity. Please avoid speculation.
policy: Policy note: staff will enforce the rules consistently and fairly.
If you have concerns, open a ticket so we can review the details.
appreciation: Thanks for keeping the story strong and the community respectful.
Your patience helps us keep Grey Hour immersive and safe.
outage: We’re tracking this issue and coordinating fixes now.
Next update will be posted once stability is confirmed.
